Clinical Protocol: Hepatology

Hepatic
Restoration.

The liver is the body's primary chemical processing plant. When hepatotoxins accumulate and liver enzymes rise, the entire metabolic architecture begins to fracture.

The Hepatic Crisis

Clinical data suggests that fatty liver disease (NAFLD) now affects 25% of the global population. This lipid accumulation, driven by insulin resistance and metabolic stress, leads to chronic inflammation and hepatocyte loss. Our protocol focuses on clearing lipid deposits and stimulating native hepatocyte regeneration.

"The liver is a silent workhorse. We target the pre-fibrotic window to reverse cellular damage before it becomes irreversible scarring."

The Regeneration Protocol

The Aura Liver Restore Protocol utilizes a 45-day sequential approach to clearing the hepatic matrix and restoring antioxidant capacity. We address recovery through three distinct biological vectors:

  • Phase 1: Toxin Displacement - Utilizing Colon Tea and Silymarin to open bile ducts and flush metabolic waste.
  • Phase 2: Mitochondrial Priming - Boosting Glutathione synthesis to protect hepatocytes from oxidative stress.
  • Phase 3: Structural Repair - Promoting cellular regeneration via concentrated Lirich and Reishi extracts.
Hepatology Workshop

Phase II Detox Seminar

Join our clinical specialists to explore the biological markers of hepatic restoration and natural ALT/AST enzyme stabilization strategies.

Enzymatic Balance

Clinical data from the Aura Verified Network shows significant improvements in ALT/AST liver enzymes and fatty liver reversal within 45 days of adherence. By restoring the native biological environment, we allow the liver to perform its 500+ metabolic functions with laboratory precision.
